abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: Models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Bane of Cowards
abilities.desc: Each time an enemy unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) within Engagement Range of one or more units from your army with this ability Falls Back, models in that enemy unit must take Desperate Escape tests. When doing so, if that enemy unit is also Battle-shocked, subtract 1 from each of those Desperate Escape tests.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: Models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Brass Stampede
abilities.desc: Each time this unit ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this unit and roll one D6 for each model in this unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: Models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Hunters from the Warp
abilities.desc: At the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: Models in this unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Split
abilities.desc: Each time a ^^Blue Horror^^ model in this unit is destroyed, after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, if this unit is not destroyed, roll one D6 for that model. On a 4+, add one ^^Brimstone Horror^^ model to this unit.

abilities.name: Sullen Malevolence (Aura)
abilities.desc: While an enemy unit is within 6" of this unit, if this unit contains one or more ^^Blue Horror^^ models, worsen the Leadership characteristic of models in that enemy unit by 1.

abilities.name: Exploding Horrors
abilities.desc: Each time this unit is selected to fight, you can select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it, then select one or more ^^Brimstone Horror^^ models in this unit. For each ^^Brimstone Horror^^ model you select, roll one D6: on a 4+, that model is destroyed and that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: Models in this unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Split
abilities.desc: Each time a ^^Pink Horror^^ or ^^Blue Horror^^ model in this unit is destroyed, after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, if this unit is not destroyed, roll one D6 for that model. On a 4+, if it was a ^^Pink Horror^^, add two ^^Blue Horror^^ models to this unit, and if it was a ^^Blue Horror^^, add one ^^Brimstone Horror^^ model to this unit.

abilities.name: Horrors are Pink. Horrors are Blue. Where once there was one, now there are two.
abilities.desc:
If, at any point, this unit contains no ^^Pink Horrors^^ models, use the ^^Blue Horrors^^ datasheet for this unit. 


_Designer’s Note: While this unit contains one or more ^^Pink Horrors^^ models, the Cackling Horrors and Exploding Horrors abilities from the Blue Horrors datasheet do not apply to this unit._

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: Models in this unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Bounding Leaps
abilities.desc: This unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: Models in this unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Slashing Dive
abilities.desc: In your Movement phase, after this unit ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved over during that move and roll one D6 for each model in this unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: Models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Infected Outbreak
abilities.desc: If you control an objective marker at the end of your Command phase and this unit is within range of that objective marker, that objective marker remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: Models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Mischief Makers (Aura)
abilities.desc: Each time an enemy unit (excluding ^^Titanic^^ units) within Engagement Range of one or more units with this ability is selected to fight, until the end of the phase, each time a model in that enemy unit makes a melee attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: Models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Grotesque Regeneration
abilities.desc: At the end of each phase, if a Beasts of Nurgle model in this unit has lost any wounds but is not destroyed, that model regains all of its lost wounds.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: Models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Death’s Heads
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the turn, each time a friendly NURGLE LEGIONES DAEMONICA unit makes an attack that targets that unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Horrifying Beauty
abilities.desc: At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of one of more units from your army with this ability must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from the result if that enemy unit is Below Half-strength.

abilities.name: Unholy Speed
abilities.desc: You can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for this unit.

abilities.name: Cutting Down the Foe
abilities.desc: Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack, if this unit made a Charge move this turn, improve the Strength and Damage characteristics of that attack by 1.

abilities.name: Scythed Impact
abilities.desc: Each time this unit makes a Charge move, until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [ANTI-INFANTRY 4+] ability.

abilities.name: Grandfather's Blessing
abilities.desc: If a model from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a BEASTS OF NURGLE unit, it can be attached to this unit instead.

abilities.name: Bounding Assault
abilities.desc: Each time this unit ends a Charge move, until the end of the turn, Pox Rider plagueswords equipped by models in this unit have the [LANCE] ability.

abilities.name: Pouncing Leap
abilities.desc: You can target this unit with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already used that Stratagem on a different unit this phase.

abilities.name: Prey on the Weak
abilities.desc: Each time this model makes an attack thattar gets an enemy unit that is Battle-shocked, add 1 to the Wound roll.
